name: tokenslim
description: Input-token compressor for Claude Code and Codex. Compresses Bash, Read, Grep, Glob, and MCP tool results before they enter model context, keeps the Read dedup cache warm across Edit/Write, rewrites eligible Bash commands with quiet flags before execution, and warns before large unbounded reads.

interface.shortDescription: Compress noisy tool output before it enters Codex context
interface.longDescription: tokenslim bundles PostToolUse hooks for Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Grep, Glob, and MCP tools plus PreToolUse Bash quiet-rewrite and a guard for large unbounded reads. It uses deterministic, fail-open heuristics to reduce repeated logs, repeated reads, and large search results while preserving failing test names, errors, paths, and other high-signal details.
defaultPrompt: Compress noisy tool output in this repo
